title: valeriana longifolia var. pilosa
intro: Valeriana longifolia var. pilosa, also known as hairy valerian, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Valerianaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include sedative, anti-anxiety, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of hairy valerian include relief from insomnia, restlessness, and stress, as well as pain relief and improved sleep quality. Hairy valerian can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is often combined with other herbs like lavender and chamomile to enhance its calming effects.
